scripts.generate:library: npm exec --yes --package "fern-api@$(node -p 'require("./fern.config.json").version')" -- fern docs md generate --library molt && npm run sanitize:generated
scripts.generate:library:local: mkdir -p ../../.tmp && TMPDIR=$(cd ../.. && pwd)/.tmp npm exec --yes --package "fern-api@$(node -p 'require("./fern.config.json").version')" -- fern docs md generate --local --library molt-local && npm run sanitize:generated
